com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets

Class PBitSet

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets.PBitSet
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PBitSet
extends AbstractNativeCollection<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
    A growable native bitset over 64-bit words; reads past the end are false.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PBitSet()
      Creates an empty bitset on the system allocator.
      PBitSet(long nbits)
      Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the system allocator.
      PBitSet(NativeAllocator allocator, long nbits)
      Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the given allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void and(PBitSet other)
      Intersects this bitset with other.
      long cardinality() 
      void clear()
      Clears every bit.
      void clear(long bit)
      Clears bit; past the end is a no-op.
      void clear(long fromBit, long toBit)
      Clears fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive; past the end is a no-op.
      void flip(long bit)
      Flips bit, growing if needed.
      void flip(long fromBit, long toBit)
      Flips fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive, growing if needed.
      void forEachSetBit(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
      Emits every set bit in ascending order.
      boolean get(long bit)
      Reads bit; past the end is false.
      long length() 
      long nextSetBit(long fromBit)
      Finds the first set bit at or after fromBit.
      void or(PBitSet other)
      Unions this bitset with other, growing if needed.
      void set(long bit)
      Sets bit, growing if needed.
      void set(long fromBit, long toBit)
      Sets fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive, growing if needed.
      void xor(PBitSet other)
      Exclusive-ors this bitset with other, growing if needed.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PBitSet

        public PBitSet()
        Creates an empty bitset on the system allocator.

      • PBitSet

        public PBitSet(long nbits)
        Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        nbits - presizes the word storage
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if nbits is negative

      • PBitSet

        public PBitSet(NativeAllocator allocator,
               long nbits)
        Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        nbits - presizes the word storage
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if nbits is negative

    • Method Detail

      • set

        public void set(long bit)
        Sets bit, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        bit - the bit index
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if bit is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clear

        public void clear(long bit)
        Clears bit; past the end is a no-op.
        Parameters:
        bit - the bit index
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if bit is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • flip

        public void flip(long bit)
        Flips bit, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        bit - the bit index
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if bit is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • set

        public void set(long fromBit,
                long toBit)
        Sets fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        fromBit - the range start, inclusive
        toBit - the range end, exclusive
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if fromBit is negative or toBit is less than fromBit
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clear

        public void clear(long fromBit,
                  long toBit)
        Clears fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive; past the end is a no-op.
        Parameters:
        fromBit - the range start, inclusive
        toBit - the range end, exclusive
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if fromBit is negative or toBit is less than fromBit
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • flip

        public void flip(long fromBit,
                 long toBit)
        Flips fromBit inclusive to toBit exclusive, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        fromBit - the range start, inclusive
        toBit - the range end, exclusive
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if fromBit is negative or toBit is less than fromBit
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public boolean get(long bit)
        Reads bit; past the end is false.
        Parameters:
        bit - the bit index
        Returns:
        the bit
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if bit is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • cardinality

        public long cardinality()
        Returns:
        the number of set bits
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • length

        public long length()
        Returns:
        the highest set bit plus one, or zero when empty
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • nextSetBit

        public long nextSetBit(long fromBit)
        Finds the first set bit at or after fromBit.
        Parameters:
        fromBit - the search start
        Returns:
        the bit index, or -1 if none
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if fromBit is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • forEachSetBit

        public void forEachSetBit(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
        Emits every set bit in ascending order.
        Parameters:
        consumer - the receiver
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if consumer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • and

        public void and(PBitSet other)
        Intersects this bitset with other.
        Parameters:
        other - the other bitset
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if other is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if either bitset is closed

      • or

        public void or(PBitSet other)
        Unions this bitset with other, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        other - the other bitset
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if other is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if either bitset is closed

      • xor

        public void xor(PBitSet other)
        Exclusive-ors this bitset with other, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        other - the other bitset
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if other is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if either bitset is closed

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Clears every bit.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
